testcase.name: Login should be success
testcase.system-out: Given User should navigate to the application...............................passed And User enter the username as "Admin"......................................passed And User enter the password as "admin123"...................................passed When User click the login button............................................passed Then Login should be success................................................passed

testcase.name: Login should be fail
testcase.system-out: Given User should navigate to the application...............................passed And User enter the username as "Admins".....................................passed And User enter the password as "admin1234"..................................passed When User click the login button............................................passed But Login should be fail....................................................passed
